welcome.title: Linker is a social media platform that connects people with friends and others who work, study, and live around them.
welcome.description: Linker is a social networking platform that allows you to connect with friends, colleagues, and explore your community in new and enjoyable ways. With a smart recommendation system and easy interactions, you can engage with people who share your interests and build social and professional connections effortlessly and securely.
welcome.visitWebsitePrefix: For more information, contact us via
welcome.feature1Desc: Text, voice & video calls with end-to-end encryption
welcome.feature2Desc: Decide who sees your profile, status, and activity
welcome.feature3Desc: Discover people who share your interests

about.title: About Linker
about.description: Linker is a social media application that allows you to connect with friends, family, colleagues, and more. You can create groups, chat with friends, share photos, videos, stories, and more.

emptyHints.clearSearch: Clear search text for broader results.
emptyHints.increaseDistance: Increase distance to discover nearby matches.

chat.quotedNotLoaded: Original message is not loaded. Scroll up to load older messages.
